custom_fields.label: Component Type
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-component_type
custom_fields.options:
Provident Fund
Additional Provident Fund
Provident Fund Loan
Professional Tax

custom_fields.description: Mention the parent component for this arrear component here (e.g., the Basic Arrear component is dependent on the Basic component)
custom_fields.label: Component
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_component

custom_fields.description: These options are used for tax projection in the declaration. Only fixed components are paid every month, while all other components are variable.
custom_fields.label: Component Sub Type
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_component_sub_type

custom_fields.description: If the check box is set to true, the component will automatically be included in the Full and Final Settlement computation during employee exit processing
custom_fields.label: Included in F and F
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_included_in_f_and_f

custom_fields.description: If 'Is Accrual' is checked, the component will be treated as an accrual component and will be accrued monthly.
custom_fields.label: Is Accrual
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_accrual

custom_fields.description: If 'Is Arrear' is checked, the component will be considered an arrear component and will be included in arrear calculations during salary processing.
custom_fields.label: Is Arrear
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_arrear

custom_fields.description: If 'Is Part of Appraisal' is checked, these components will be considered in the appraisal and will be visible in the salary appraisal calculation.
custom_fields.label: Is Part of Appraisal
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_part_of_appraisal

custom_fields.description: If the 'Is Part of CTC' checkbox is set to true, the component will be considered part of the CTC during Salary Structure Assignment processing, and components marked as part of CTC will be visible in the CTC breakup preview
custom_fields.label: Is Part of CTC
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_part_of_ctc

custom_fields.description: If the 'Is Part of Gross Pay' checkbox is set to true, the component will be considered part of the gross pay during salary slip processing.
custom_fields.label: Is Part of Gross Pay
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_part_of_gross_pay

custom_fields.description: If 'Is Reimbursement' is checked, the component will be treated as a reimbursement component and will appear in the reimbursement child table of the Salary Structure Assignment
custom_fields.label: Is Reimbursement
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_is_reimbursement

custom_fields.description: Please mention the tax exemption component here. This component is considered a tax exemption in the declaration form. If I am not eligible for this component, I should not be allowed to enter any value in the declaration.
custom_fields.label: Sub Category
custom_fields.name: Salary Component-custom_sub_category
custom_fields.options:
Hostel Allowance
Uniform Allowance
Education Allowance
Gratuity

property_setters.name: Salary Component-component_type-options
property_setters.value:

Professional Tax
LTA Taxable
LTA Non Taxable
Vehicle Maintenance Reimbursement

NPS
ESIC
LWF
Income Tax
Tax Exemption
GST

property_setters.name: Salary Component-pay_against_benefit_claim-description
property_setters.value: It is defined that only the components with the checkbox selected will be shown in the benefit claim. The others will not be displayed.
